textByHashes.f5170b6e8849e7b3440858c825693795cfa547d8: I give permission... blah de blah... etc. Okay, that's all in order; you may use the mineshaft now. I'll hang onto this scroll, shall I?
textByHashes.cfab4c23306523ddae9ad15df97936fdb7be1170: What on earth are you giving me another scroll for?
textByHashes.8687159cea76874cb07628f3206c75683ec3c3b2: Good day; what can I do for you?
textByHashes.c3d5a38d65efc3159b3f48be148e26ae51d8cee1: I am involved in various stages of the dig, from the initial investigation to the installation of the mine shafts.
textByHashes.356c6cfd081225077e155e81aff0de7309cd3e6e: Well, let me know when you are.
textByHashes.fd492aa528c418cef5eef8b659d5eaf75a355b56: You can only use a site you have the appropriate exam level for.
textByHashes.994a22974120d42b37f8068eff2a8ef4f56d1454: Yes, only persons with the correct Earth Sciences certificate can dig here. A level 1 certificate will let you dig in a level 1 site and so on.
textByHashes.1e108470f7e058a2bf9fe968cd48e58d09ebb94e: Well that's nice for you. You can't dig around here without a certificate though.
textByHashes.ecd76901e4818b7155f56fa7a3eeeab7b31bcf91: Oh yeah? And whose errand is that then? Where is your specimen jar?
textByHashes.dc6d1056022444a1658022a22fab7e3d86262db1: And you reckon you have been sent on an errand - without a specimen jar? Sorry, I can't let you do that!
textByHashes.f7c24c2572b3930e17d77a1d53b28d4aa28803cd: Oh you are, are you? Well where's your specimen jar?
textByHashes.f689848f984bd85731bb20e8dfeae7865fcfcebf: Well how can you handle the specimens without it? As you should know, specimens are to be kept in specimen jars to keep them safe and preserved. Next time bring it along!
textByHashes.9d43e1c90d81cf544ec9f4771899b42d2c3cd5a8: Sorry; this area is private. The only way you'll get to use these is by impressing the archaeological expert up at the centre.
textByHashes.aab6f5d8cf7a3df5148ae2867ee592f3e7cde821: Find something worthwhile and he might let you use the winches. Until then, get lost!
textByHashes.218fec896f0e9a9ab255b70a558d6237116bbe7f: Oi! What do you think you're doing? There's fragile specimens around here!
textByHashes.bc630524530c1e3fc5da6da07ad4af397944c32b: Use your brush on specimens to clean them, not the dirt!
textByHashes.59386bea0d479e48ee19c8540b357038c9a9c83f: Hey, where are your leather gloves?
textByHashes.6fea454dc53dfb7bd377f2de52e45c0225d9f00c: Well get some and put them on first!
textByHashes.40f47f735100c61ac28480835c2d460e6775669c: Oi! No boots! No leather boots: no digging!
textByHashes.a61b490ddb88a162a8a28acbe144a35ec576ab42: Sorry, you must use a rock pick to dig at a level 2 site.
textByHashes.6e90bbc8e92f2dc0e30782eb88850fb65fb41f10: Excuse me! No digging in the specimen trays please.
textByHashes.79da5bcf1c45994d57194cd30df40ecdd40d7177: No, no; rock picks should only be used to dig at a level 2 site.
textByHashes.9c3cfdb9ac3eb768382f9b4db55a8902d1e83c15: Ah, it's the great archaeologist! Congratulations on your discovery.
textByHashes.b6c80781491679d704f2572a1ed6b7b7749511b6: What do you think you're doing?
